HD2020 Gen6 realtime-text frame (Hd2020Cmd::RealtimeText, 0x01) carrying the
string "HI" rasterized onto a 32×8 monochrome panel with the default layout
(letter_spacing = 1, glyphs centered vertically).

Bytes: a5 01 24 00  20 00 08 00  <32 bitmap bytes>  77
  a5           start / resync byte
  01           cmd = RealtimeText
  24 00        len = 36 (u16 little-endian) = 4-byte bitmap header + 32 pixel bytes
  20 00        bitmap width  = 32 (u16 little-endian)
  08 00        bitmap height = 8  (u16 little-endian)
  <32 bytes>   1-bpp pixels, row-major, stride = ceil(32/8) = 4 bytes/row,
               MSB = leftmost pixel. 'H' at x=0, 'I' at x=6; rows 0..6 lit,
               row 7 blank. First row = 89 c0 00 00.
  77           checksum = (cmd + len bytes + all payload bytes) & 0xff

Provenance: design-derived, generated by encoding through `hd2020::render` +
`hd2020::Hd2020Frame` (DESIGN.md §6), 2026-07-19. The frame envelope, the
bitmap dimension header, and the bundled 5×7 font are all placeholders — no
capture or Go reference (hd2020_gen6_test.go) was available. Reconcile the wire
format and swap in the Plan 9 font tables before locking.
